summary: Completed frontend testing of OpenClaw Mission Control iteration 9 - Model Selector Redesign with hover-based interaction. All 18 requested features tested and verified. Key changes: 1) Model selector now uses HOVER-based interaction (not click), 2) < icon on LEFT side of provider names, 3) Providers dropdown directly below Select Model button, 4) Models panel appears LEFT of providers (flush/tight, no gap), 5) Models panel bottom-aligns with providers (grows upward), 6) All models scrollable (Venice 31 models verified), 7) 150ms debounce on mouse leave.
passed_tests: Model selector trigger shows 'Select model' with ChevronDown icon
Clicking Select model opens providers dropdown DIRECTLY BELOW the trigger button
6 providers listed with < icon on LEFT side: huggingface(9), ollama(11), opencode(13), opencode-go(3), openrouter(24), venice(31)
HOVERING a provider shows models panel to the LEFT (hover-based, not click-based)
Models panel is flush/tight with providers panel (no gap, shared border styling)
Models panel bottom-aligns with providers (grows upward for large lists)
Each model shows: name, Cost badge ($/$$/$$$/Free), Context badge (2M/256K/125K), capability icons
Clicking a model selects it and closes dropdown
Selected model name shows in trigger button text (e.g., 'Claude Opus 4.6')
Hovering a different provider smoothly switches the models panel
Moving mouse away from both panels closes the models panel (with 150ms debounce verified)
Agent sparkles icon next to + button links to /agent page
No suggestion cards below chat input on home screen (only 'MISSION CONTROL' title text)
Plus menu works with Skills/Connectors/Style sub-menus (all 8 skills, 6 connectors, 4 styles)
Chat send and thread creation work correctly
All sidebar navigation tabs work (Chat, Agent, Dashboard, Jobs, Approvals, Spaces, Settings, Cowork, Customize)
seed_data_creation: None - using mock data from Zustand store
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 18 requested features tested and working. Key iteration 9 changes verified: 1) Model selector uses HOVER-based interaction - hovering a provider shows its models panel to the LEFT, 2) < (ChevronLeft) icon on LEFT side of each provider name, 3) Providers panel directly below trigger, models panel to LEFT of providers, 4) Panels are flush/tight with shared border styling (borderRadius adjustments), 5) Models panel uses position:absolute with right:100% and bottom:0 for left-side bottom-aligned positioning, 6) 150ms debounce timer on mouse leave, 7) Venice shows all 31 models (scrollable via ScrollArea), 8) Cost badges ($, $$, $$$, Free), Context badges (2M, 256K, etc.), and 6 capability icons per model. Plus menu works with all sub-menus. Note: 'Made with Emergent' badge may overlap model selector in conversation mode (input at bottom) - this is a platform UI element, not a bug. Test on HOME SCREEN where input is centered.
mocked_apis_note: ALL APIs are MOCKED via Zustand store - no real backend calls. Mocked: sendMessage (simulated chat response with streaming), executeCommand (simulated terminal output), switchModel (state update), cancelJob (state update), approveRequest/rejectRequest (state update), createThread/deleteThread (localStorage), addSpace (localStorage), Agent responses (simulated with setTimeout delay)
